texto: The embrace was long and tight, but more like a complex language then a simple prolonged act. She said nothing at all, but damn she said everything. And I finally got it.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Pierce Minor: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “The embrace was long and tight, but more like a complex language then a simple prolonged act. She…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, young-adult-fiction, embrace pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
